source: conversation attachment official EVOLUTION ZERO app icon PNG

processing.standardIcons: preserve source composition, mild contrast/sharpness, downscale with Lanczos
processing.maskableIcon: source scaled to 82 percent on dark branded pad with central safe-zone guide
processing.cachePolicy: no service worker cache expansion; existing manifest/icon network-first only

safeArea.androidAdaptiveIconExpectation: dinosaur face, DNA core, and EVOLUTION ZERO text remain inside central maskable safe zone
safeArea.iosExpectation: standard/apple icons preserve supplied rounded app-icon art; iOS applies final corner mask

sourceRepositoryStorage: source artwork is represented in docs/assets/pwa_icon_mvp_a06c_contact.png; generated_raw copy is local-only and ignored
